content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates all four VIEW components consistently. Wonder is genuine — the coach is curious about the actual flicker on the client's face (turn 6), not running a script. Empathy is felt, not performed — turn 12's 'really human. And really sad, actually' lands as the coach's own response, not a sympathy noise. Impartiality is strong: the coach refuses to take the partner-picking bait in turn 5, doesn't collude with disdain for the ex, and in turn 14 explicitly tells the client she doesn't have to do anything with what arose. Vulnerability shows up in turn 6 ('I saw it... tell me if I'm off base') and turn 8 ('tell me if I'm off base') — the coach offers reads as offerings, not verdicts. Pace is the strongest signal: the coach repeatedly slows when the client speeds up (turns 10, 12, 14 all begin with stillness/quiet), holds silence rather than filling it, and resists the client's multiple attempts to convert feeling into plan. The coach has no agenda for where the conversation lands — turn 14 explicitly disclaims needing a takeaway. No preacher-mode, no improvement-mode language, no filler validation.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with genuine curiosity about felt experience rather than diagnosis; pace is unhurried."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the loaded phrase back without agenda; question is open, not leading toward a predetermined answer."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names own observation with vulnerability ('tell me if I'm off base'); refuses partner-picking bait without making it a fight. Offers the read as offering, not verdict."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds steady through deflection without becoming prickly; explicitly disclaims accusation ('not a criticism'). Curious about the cost of staying, not pushing her to stay."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pure VIEW moment: a single quiet question, holds silence, doesn't stack questions. Wonder for the actual phenomenon in front of him."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly slows pace ('Can we just... stay here'); empathy is felt, not summarized. No agenda for where it goes next."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You don't have to do anything with it' — undefended impartiality, no need for client to land anywhere. Honors the protective strategy rather than pathologizing it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["looking-for-whats-wrong", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "deconstruct-the-victim-to-release-anger"],
  "notes": "Coach took a softer path than the 'i-don't-buy-your-story' route, but did so from genuine VIEW rather than avoidance — the gentleness held steady through deflection without colluding. Stance scoring is high regardless of methodology choices."
}
